MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS DENNIS SCHUELKE and JUDITH SCHUELKE Motion For Order Confirming Arbitration Award:
APPEAR: Thomas D. Mauriello, Esq. 677-1238 for petitioners & moving parties; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED) and in addition, allows supplemental interest requested. Petitioner to submit order. (302/AJR/ju) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
